question: List all vendors headquartered in Germany
sql: SELECT v.vendor_id, v.vendor_nm FROM vendor_mst v JOIN country_lkp c ON v.country_cd = c.country_cd WHERE c.country_nm = 'Germany';

question: List all employees hired after 2020-01-01
sql: SELECT emp_id, emp_nm, hire_dt FROM employee WHERE hire_dt > '2020-01-01';

question: List all department names and their manager employee ids
sql: SELECT dept_id, dept_nm, manager_emp_id FROM department;

question: What is the total number of items in the catalog?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS item_count FROM item_mst;

question: List all warehouses in the APAC region
sql: SELECT w.whse_id, w.whse_nm FROM whse_mst w JOIN region_lkp r ON w.region_cd = r.region_cd WHERE r.region_cd = 'APAC';

question: What currencies are available in the system?
sql: SELECT currency_cd, currency_nm, symbol FROM currency_lkp;

question: List all customers of type WHOLESALE
sql: SELECT cust_id, cust_nm FROM cust_mst WHERE cust_type = 'WHOLESALE';

question: How many orders have status CANCELLED?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cancelled_orders FROM ord_hdr WHERE status_cd = 'CANCELLED';

question: List all leave types
sql: SELECT leave_type_cd, leave_type_nm FROM leave_type_lkp;

question: What are the distinct GL account types?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT acct_type FROM gl_account;

question: List all contracts starting after 2023-01-01
sql: SELECT contract_id, vendor_id, start_dt FROM contract_mst WHERE start_dt > '2023-01-01';

question: How many support tickets are still open?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_tickets FROM support_ticket WHERE status_cd = 'OPEN';

question: Total order value by region
sql: SELECT r.region_nm, SUM(d.qty * d.unit_price) AS total_value FROM ord_hdr h JOIN ord_dtl_2 d ON d.ord_id = h.ord_id JOIN cust_mst c ON c.cust_id = h.cust_id JOIN cust_addr a ON a.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN region_lkp r ON r.region_cd = a.region_cd GROUP BY r.region_nm;

question: Total quantity received per warehouse
sql: SELECT wh.whse_nm, SUM(rd.qty_received) AS total_received FROM po_receipt_hdr rh JOIN po_receipt_dtl rd ON rd.receipt_id = rh.receipt_id JOIN whse_mst wh ON wh.whse_id = rh.whse_id GROUP BY wh.whse_nm;

question: Number of orders per customer country
sql: SELECT cl.country_nm, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM ord_hdr h JOIN cust_mst c ON c.cust_id = h.cust_id JOIN country_lkp cl ON cl.country_cd = c.country_cd GROUP BY cl.country_nm;

question: Average unit cost per vendor
sql: SELECT v.vendor_nm, AVG(d.unit_cost) AS avg_unit_cost FROM po_hdr h JOIN po_dtl d ON d.po_id = h.po_id JOIN vendor_mst v ON v.vendor_id = h.vendor_id GROUP BY v.vendor_nm;

question: Total invoice amount per customer
sql: SELECT c.cust_nm, SUM(i.total_amt) AS total_invoiced FROM invoice_hdr i JOIN cust_mst c ON c.cust_id = i.cust_id GROUP BY c.cust_nm;

question: Count of leave requests by leave type
sql: SELECT lt.leave_type_nm, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM leave_request lr JOIN leave_type_lkp lt ON lt.leave_type_cd = lr.leave_type_cd GROUP BY lt.leave_type_nm;

question: Total budget amount per cost center
sql: SELECT cc.cost_center_nm, SUM(b.budget_amt) AS total_budget FROM budget_line b JOIN cost_center cc ON cc.cost_center_id = b.cost_center_id GROUP BY cc.cost_center_nm;

question: Number of opportunities per account
sql: SELECT a.account_nm, COUNT(*) AS opp_count FROM opportunity o JOIN account a ON a.account_id = o.account_id GROUP BY a.account_nm;

question: Total payment amount received per customer
sql: SELECT c.cust_nm, SUM(p.amt) AS total_paid FROM payment_hdr p JOIN cust_mst c ON c.cust_id = p.cust_id GROUP BY c.cust_nm;

question: Count of stock transactions by warehouse and transaction type
sql: SELECT w.whse_nm, t.txn_type, COUNT(*) AS txn_count FROM stock_txn_hdr t JOIN whse_mst w ON w.whse_id = t.whse_id GROUP BY w.whse_nm, t.txn_type;

question: Total quantity on hand by item category
sql: SELECT ic.cat_nm, SUM(sb.qty_on_hand) AS total_qty FROM stock_bal sb JOIN item_mst im ON im.item_id = sb.item_id JOIN item_cat_map icm ON icm.item_id = im.item_id JOIN item_cat ic ON ic.cat_id = icm.cat_id GROUP BY ic.cat_nm;

question: Number of campaign members per campaign
sql: SELECT c.campaign_nm, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM campaign_member_map m JOIN campaign c ON c.campaign_id = m.campaign_id GROUP BY c.campaign_nm;

question: Average rating per vendor
sql: SELECT v.vendor_nm, AVG(vr.score) AS avg_score FROM vendor_rating vr JOIN vendor_mst v ON v.vendor_id = vr.vendor_id GROUP BY v.vendor_nm;

question: Count of purchase orders per vendor country
sql: SELECT cl.country_nm, COUNT(*) AS po_count FROM po_hdr p JOIN vendor_mst v ON v.vendor_id = p.vendor_id JOIN country_lkp cl ON cl.country_cd = v.country_cd GROUP BY cl.country_nm;

question: Number of price list items per price list
sql: SELECT pl.price_list_nm, COUNT(*) AS item_count FROM price_list_itm pli JOIN price_list pl ON pl.price_list_id = pli.price_list_id GROUP BY pl.price_list_nm;

question: Total GL transaction amount by account type
sql: SELECT ga.acct_type, SUM(gd.amt) AS total_amt FROM gl_txn_dtl gd JOIN gl_account ga ON ga.gl_acct_id = gd.gl_acct_id GROUP BY ga.acct_type;

question: Number of interactions per contact
sql: SELECT c.contact_nm, COUNT(*) AS interaction_count FROM interaction_log il JOIN contact c ON c.contact_id = il.contact_id GROUP BY c.contact_nm;

question: Number of support tickets per account
sql: SELECT a.account_nm, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM support_ticket t JOIN account a ON a.account_id = t.account_id GROUP BY a.account_nm;

question: Total contract item price per vendor
sql: SELECT v.vendor_nm, SUM(ci.contract_price) AS total_contract_value FROM contract_itm ci JOIN contract_mst cm ON cm.contract_id = ci.contract_id JOIN vendor_mst v ON v.vendor_id = cm.vendor_id GROUP BY v.vendor_nm;

question: Number of employees per department
sql: SELECT d.dept_nm, COUNT(*) AS emp_count FROM emp_dept_assign eda JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = eda.dept_id JOIN employee e ON e.emp_id = eda.emp_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm;

question: Revenue per sales rep's department
sql: SELECT d.dept_nm, SUM(od.qty * od.unit_price) AS revenue FROM ord_hdr oh JOIN ord_dtl_2 od ON od.ord_id = oh.ord_id JOIN sales_rep_map srm ON srm.rep_id = oh.sales_rep_id JOIN emp_dept_assign eda ON eda.emp_id = srm.emp_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = eda.dept_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm;

question: Total purchase order value per buyer's department
sql: SELECT d.dept_nm, SUM(pd.qty * pd.unit_cost) AS total_po_value FROM po_hdr ph JOIN po_dtl pd ON pd.po_id = ph.po_id JOIN emp_dept_assign eda ON eda.emp_id = ph.buyer_emp_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = eda.dept_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm;

question: Number of purchase requisitions per requester's department
sql: SELECT d.dept_nm, COUNT(*) AS req_count FROM purchase_req pr JOIN emp_dept_assign eda ON eda.emp_id = pr.requested_by_emp_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = eda.dept_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm;

question: Total budget amount per department
sql: SELECT d.dept_nm, SUM(b.budget_amt) AS total_budget FROM budget_line b JOIN cost_center cc ON cc.cost_center_id = b.cost_center_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = cc.dept_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm;

question: Total invoice amount per customer's region
sql: SELECT r.region_nm, SUM(i.total_amt) AS total_invoiced FROM invoice_hdr i JOIN cust_mst c ON c.cust_id = i.cust_id JOIN cust_addr a ON a.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN region_lkp r ON r.region_cd = a.region_cd GROUP BY r.region_nm;

question: Total payment amount per customer's country
sql: SELECT cl.country_nm, SUM(p.amt) AS total_paid FROM payment_hdr p JOIN cust_mst c ON c.cust_id = p.cust_id JOIN country_lkp cl ON cl.country_cd = c.country_cd GROUP BY cl.country_nm;

question: Number of CRM accounts per customer country
sql: SELECT cl.country_nm, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM account a JOIN cust_mst c ON c.cust_id = a.cust_id JOIN country_lkp cl ON cl.country_cd = c.country_cd GROUP BY cl.country_nm;

question: Total expense report amount by employee's department
sql: SELECT d.dept_nm, SUM(er.amt) AS total_expenses FROM expense_report er JOIN emp_dept_assign eda ON eda.emp_id = er.emp_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = eda.dept_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm;

question: Number of sales interactions per rep's department
sql: SELECT d.dept_nm, COUNT(*) AS interaction_count FROM interaction_log il JOIN emp_dept_assign eda ON eda.emp_id = il.rep_emp_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = eda.dept_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm;

question: Total quantity sold per item category
sql: SELECT ic.cat_nm, SUM(od.qty) AS total_qty_sold FROM ord_dtl_2 od JOIN item_mst im ON im.item_id = od.item_id JOIN item_cat_map icm ON icm.item_id = im.item_id JOIN item_cat ic ON ic.cat_id = icm.cat_id GROUP BY ic.cat_nm;

question: Total purchase order quantity per item category
sql: SELECT ic.cat_nm, SUM(pd.qty) AS total_qty_ordered FROM po_dtl pd JOIN item_mst im ON im.item_id = pd.item_id JOIN item_cat_map icm ON icm.item_id = im.item_id JOIN item_cat ic ON ic.cat_id = icm.cat_id GROUP BY ic.cat_nm;

question: Number of price list items per item category
sql: SELECT ic.cat_nm, COUNT(*) AS item_count FROM price_list_itm pli JOIN item_mst im ON im.item_id = pli.item_id JOIN item_cat_map icm ON icm.item_id = im.item_id JOIN item_cat ic ON ic.cat_id = icm.cat_id GROUP BY ic.cat_nm;

question: Total contract item price per item category
sql: SELECT ic.cat_nm, SUM(ci.contract_price) AS total_price FROM contract_itm ci JOIN item_mst im ON im.item_id = ci.item_id JOIN item_cat_map icm ON icm.item_id = im.item_id JOIN item_cat ic ON ic.cat_id = icm.cat_id GROUP BY ic.cat_nm;

question: Number of approved purchase orders per approver's department
sql: SELECT d.dept_nm, COUNT(DISTINCT ph.po_id) AS approved_po_count FROM po_approval_hist pah JOIN po_hdr ph ON ph.po_id = pah.po_id JOIN emp_dept_assign eda ON eda.emp_id = pah.approver_emp_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = eda.dept_id WHERE ph.status_cd = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY d.dept_nm;

question: Month-over-month order line count growth by item category
sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT ic.cat_nm AS category, strftime('%Y-%m', oh.order_dt) AS month, COUNT(*) AS line_count FROM ord_dtl_2 od JOIN ord_hdr oh ON oh.ord_id = od.ord_id JOIN item_mst im ON im.item_id = od.item_id JOIN item_cat_map icm ON icm.item_id = im.item_id JOIN item_cat ic ON ic.cat_id = icm.cat_id GROUP BY ic.cat_nm, strftime('%Y-%m', oh.order_dt)) SELECT category, month, line_count, line_count - LAG(line_count) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY month) AS mom_growth FROM monthly ORDER BY category, month;

question: Running total of GL transaction amounts by fiscal period
sql: WITH period_totals AS (SELECT fp.period_nm AS period, SUM(gd.amt) AS period_amt FROM gl_txn_hdr gh JOIN gl_txn_dtl gd ON gd.gl_txn_id = gh.gl_txn_id JOIN fiscal_period fp ON fp.fiscal_period_id = gh.fiscal_period_id GROUP BY fp.period_nm) SELECT period, period_amt, SUM(period_amt) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS running_total FROM period_totals ORDER BY period;

question: Rank vendors by total purchase order spend
sql: WITH vendor_spend AS (SELECT v.vendor_nm, SUM(pd.qty * pd.unit_cost) AS total_spend FROM po_hdr ph JOIN po_dtl pd ON pd.po_id = ph.po_id JOIN vendor_mst v ON v.vendor_id = ph.vendor_id GROUP BY v.vendor_nm) SELECT vendor_nm, total_spend, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_spend DESC) AS spend_rank FROM vendor_spend ORDER BY spend_rank;

question: Top 3 customers by total order value in each region
sql: WITH region_cust AS (SELECT r.region_nm AS region, c.cust_nm AS customer, SUM(od.qty * od.unit_price) AS total_value FROM ord_hdr oh JOIN ord_dtl_2 od ON od.ord_id = oh.ord_id JOIN cust_mst c ON c.cust_id = oh.cust_id JOIN cust_addr a ON a.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN region_lkp r ON r.region_cd = a.region_cd GROUP BY r.region_nm, c.cust_nm), ranked AS (SELECT region, customer, total_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region ORDER BY total_value DESC) AS rn FROM region_cust) SELECT region, customer, total_value FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY region, rn;

question: Month-over-month invoiced revenue growth
sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', invoice_dt) AS month, SUM(total_amt) AS revenue FROM invoice_hdr GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', invoice_dt)) SELECT month, revenue, revenue - LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS mom_growth FROM monthly ORDER BY month;

question: Cumulative gross payroll amount per employee ordered by run date
sql: WITH emp_runs AS (SELECT pd.emp_id, pr.run_dt, pd.gross_amt FROM payroll_dtl pd JOIN payroll_run pr ON pr.run_id = pd.run_id) SELECT emp_id, run_dt, gross_amt, SUM(gross_amt) OVER (PARTITION BY emp_id ORDER BY run_dt) AS cumulative_gross FROM emp_runs ORDER BY emp_id, run_dt;

question: Rank employees within department by leave request count
sql: WITH dept_leave AS (SELECT d.dept_nm AS department, e.emp_nm AS employee_name, COUNT(*) AS leave_count FROM leave_request lr JOIN employee e ON e.emp_id = lr.emp_id JOIN emp_dept_assign eda ON eda.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = eda.dept_id GROUP BY d.dept_nm, e.emp_nm) SELECT department, employee_name, leave_count, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY leave_count DESC) AS dept_rank FROM dept_leave ORDER BY department, dept_rank;

question: Running total of stock transaction quantity per warehouse ordered by date
sql: WITH txns AS (SELECT th.whse_id, th.txn_dt, td.qty FROM stock_txn_hdr th JOIN stock_txn_dtl td ON td.txn_id = th.txn_id) SELECT whse_id, txn_dt, qty, SUM(qty) OVER (PARTITION BY whse_id ORDER BY txn_dt) AS running_qty FROM txns ORDER BY whse_id, txn_dt;

question: Month-over-month count of closed-won opportunities
sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', changed_dt) AS month, COUNT(*) AS closed_won_count FROM opportunity_stage_hist WHERE stage_cd = 'CLOSED_WON' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', changed_dt)) SELECT month, closed_won_count, closed_won_count - LAG(closed_won_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS mom_growth FROM monthly ORDER BY month;

question: Rank items within category by total quantity sold
sql: WITH item_sales AS (SELECT ic.cat_nm AS category, im.item_nm AS item_name, SUM(od.qty) AS total_qty FROM ord_dtl_2 od JOIN item_mst im ON im.item_id = od.item_id JOIN item_cat_map icm ON icm.item_id = im.item_id JOIN item_cat ic ON ic.cat_id = icm.cat_id GROUP BY ic.cat_nm, im.item_nm) SELECT category, item_name, total_qty, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY total_qty DESC) AS qty_rank FROM item_sales ORDER BY category, qty_rank;
